ofertaDesc.label: Services
ofertaDesc.description: ZRE ELKO provides services in full scope — from design, through manufacturing, installation, modernisation and overhauls of boilers, pipelines, turbine sets and other auxiliary installations, up to commissioning, operator training and handover.
ofertaDesc.permissionsText: For construction, modernisation and overhaul works, the Company holds relevant authorisations issued by UDT, TÜV and ASIT/SVTI.
items: Steam and hot-water coal-fired boilers with capacities up to approx. 50 MW or 60 t steam/h
Complete biomass steam boilers fired with wood chips and RDF
Pressure elements: water heaters, steam superheaters, membrane walls, headers, reduction stations, tees, flanges, manifolds and others

about.label: About us
about.description: A company based in Racibórz, specialising in manufacturing, modernisation and installation services in professional and industrial power engineering — in Poland and abroad.

tiles.title: History & profile
tiles.text: March 1991 marks the beginning of ZRE ELKO Sp. z o.o.'s operations. Our core profile is the design from scratch, manufacturing, installation and commissioning of water and steam boilers. We specialise in boilers fired with coal, gas, RDF and biomass fuels.

tiles.title: Full service scope
tiles.text: ZRE ELKO delivers tasks in full scope — from design, through manufacturing, installation, modernisation and overhauls of boilers, pipelines and auxiliary installations, to commissioning, operator training and handover of power engineering systems.

tiles.title: Authorisations & reach
tiles.text: We hold UDT, TÜV and ASIT/SVTI authorisations. Assembly personnel hold E and D qualifications. We operate in Poland and abroad — Germany, France, Austria, Czech Republic, Great Britain, Switzerland, Sweden, India, Belarus, Ukraine and Finland.

certyfikaty.description: For the offered scope of production and services, ZRE ELKO Sp. z o.o. holds UDT, TÜV, SVTI ASIT and EN ISO 9001:2000 authorisations. All works meet the highest technical and safety requirements applicable in professional and industrial power engineering.

oferta.heading: Services
oferta.subheading: Comprehensive services for professional and industrial power engineering.

page.label: Services
page.intro: ZRE ELKO delivers tasks in full scope — from design, through manufacturing, installation, modernisation and overhauls of boilers, pipelines and auxiliary installations, to commissioning and handover. All work is performed with UDT, TÜV and SVTI/ASIT authorisations.
page.biuroIntro: The ZRE ELKO In-house Design Office has the competences to design boilers for various fuels — coal, natural gas, biomass, municipal waste, alternative fuels (RDF, pre-RDF) — from concept design, through basic design, up to detailed engineering. We design boilers according to PN-EN 12952-3, PN-EN 12953-3 and WUDT/UC/2003.
biuroParagraphs: We also have full competences to design various types of pipelines according to PN-EN 13480.

In addition to projects for ZRE ELKO's own manufacturing and installation activities, we provide boiler design services to our European partners — companies from Germany, Belgium, Austria, Czech Republic and France — produced by other European manufacturers.

Furthermore, the In-house Design Office provides all types of services consisting in the preparation of technical analyses and expert opinions commissioned by external Clients in the field of boiler and component design.
biuroHighlights: Boilers for coal, gas, biomass, RDF and pre-RDF
Technical expert opinions and analyses on commission

items.title: Boiler manufacturing
items.description: Manufacturing of steam and hot-water boilers for coal, gas, biomass, municipal waste and alternative fuels (RDF, pre-RDF) with capacity up to 50 MW or 60 t steam/h.

items.title: Installation & modernisation
items.description: Comprehensive installation, overhaul and modernisation of boilers, pipelines and auxiliary systems at power engineering facilities — in Poland and abroad.

items.title: Industrial pipelines
items.description: Construction of industrial pipelines according to PN-EN 13480 — from concept design, through basic design, to installation and acceptance with UDT, TÜV and SVTI authorisations.

items.title: ELKO Design Office
items.description: Full technical documentation for boilers according to PN-EN 12952-3, PN-EN 12953-3 and WUDT/UC/2003 — for own production and European partners from Germany, Belgium, Austria, Czech Republic and France.

realizacje.heading: Projects
realizacje.subheading: Projects we have completed with full commitment.

items.title: 30 MW coal-fired steam boiler — EC Jaworzno
items.description: Manufacturing and installation of a 30 MW coal-fired steam boiler for Elektrociepłownia Jaworzno. The scope covered the full cycle — from detail design, through pressure element production, to installation, commissioning and operator training.

items.title: 45 MW coal-fired steam boiler — EC Łódź
items.description: Manufacture of a 45 MW steam boiler for the Łódź combined heat and power plant. The project was executed in compliance with PN-EN 12952-3 and included production of membrane walls, steam superheaters and water preheaters.

items.title: 20 MW coal-fired steam boiler — Elektrownia Szczecin
items.description: Supply and installation of a 20 MW steam boiler for Elektrownia Szczecin. The scope of work included boiler production, steam pipelines and installation of the ash-removal system.

items.title: 35 MW steam boiler — Kraftwerk Bayern (Germany)
items.description: Manufacture of a 35 MW steam boiler for a German partner. The project was executed in accordance with TÜV standards for the German market.

items.title: 8 MW hot-water boiler — Ciepłownia Racibórz
items.description: Construction of an 8 MW hot-water boiler for the municipal heat plant in Racibórz. The coal-fired boiler is adapted for operation in a district heating network.

items.title: 12 MW hot-water boiler — Industrial Plant Kraków
items.description: Supply and commissioning of a 12 MW hot-water boiler for an industrial plant in Kraków. Work included design, manufacture, installation, UDT acceptance and operator training.

items.title: 15 MW gas-fired boiler — Factory Wrocław
items.description: Manufacture and installation of a 15 MW gas-fired boiler with multi-fuel burners. The installation is equipped with a modern control and process-monitoring system.

items.title: 10 MW gas-fired boiler — Teplárna Brno (Czech Republic)
items.description: Delivery of a 10 MW gas-fired boiler to a Czech client. The project was executed in cooperation with a local partner, in compliance with CE standards and Czech market requirements.

items.title: 25 MW biomass boiler — Ciepłownia Bydgoszcz
items.description: Complete delivery of a 25 MW wood-chip biomass boiler. The project covered the full scope — design, manufacture, installation and commissioning of the plant including the fuel-feeding system.

items.title: 20 MW biomass boiler — EC Poznań
items.description: Construction of a 20 MW biomass boiler for the Poznań combined heat and power plant. The boiler is designed for burning forestry and agricultural biomass and is equipped with a modern flue-gas dedusting system.

items.title: 18 MW RDF boiler — Waste-to-Energy Plant Kraków
items.description: Manufacture of a steam boiler adapted for burning RDF alternative fuel with a capacity of 18 MW. The installation meets the requirements of the IED directive regarding pollutant emissions.

items.title: Biomass boiler — Heizkraftwerk Graz (Austria)
items.description: Supply of pressure components for a biomass boiler for an Austrian partner. The project was executed in accordance with SVTI/ASIT standards and Austrian market requirements.

items.title: Process pipelines — Gdańsk Refinery
items.description: Fabrication of high-pressure process pipelines in accordance with PN-EN 13480. The scope included design, prefabrication, on-site installation and UDT acceptance.

items.title: Steam pipelines — Chemical Plant Puławy
items.description: Modernisation and expansion of the steam pipeline network at Zakłady Azotowe Puławy. Work was carried out within short maintenance windows without interrupting plant production.

items.title: High-pressure pipelines — EC Warszawa
items.description: Installation of high-pressure superheated steam pipelines for Elektrociepłownia Warszawa. The project covered over 2 km of DN50–DN500 pipelines with valves and supports.

items.title: Pipelines — Centrale Thermique Lyon (France)
items.description: Prefabrication and supply of pipeline components for a French thermal power plant. Components made from P91 and P22 materials in accordance with the client's technical documentation.

items.title: Boiler modernisation 40 MW — EC Katowice
items.description: Comprehensive modernisation of a 40 MW steam boiler — replacement of superheaters, preheaters and membrane walls. Work was completed during the planned major overhaul of the combined heat and power plant.

items.title: Boiler modernisation 30 MW — Ciepłownia Opole
items.description: Overhaul and modernisation of a 30 MW hot-water boiler consisting of replacement of heat exchanger components and the combustion system. The scope also included adaptation of the installation to new emission standards.

items.title: Major overhaul — Elektrownia Kozienice
items.description: Major overhaul of a steam boiler including replacement of membrane walls, repair of superheaters and replacement of valves. Work was carried out in close coordination with the power plant's maintenance schedule.

items.title: Steam system modernisation — EC Gdynia
items.description: Modernisation of the steam system of the turbine set at the Gdynia combined heat and power plant. The scope of work included replacement of fresh-steam pipelines, control valves and thermal insulation.

items.title: Auxiliary installations — Elektrownia Rybnik
items.description: Construction of auxiliary installations for the power units of Elektrownia Rybnik. Work included installation of feed-water pipelines, drains and vents of the boiler system.

items.title: Modernisation — Power Station (United Kingdom)
items.description: Supply and installation of pressure components for a modernised power station in the United Kingdom. The project was carried out in a consortium with a British partner, in compliance with BS standards and UK market requirements.

items.title: Modernisation — Heizkraftwerk (Switzerland)
items.description: Supply of boiler components and pipelines for a Swiss combined heat and power plant. Execution compliant with SVTI/ASIT standards and requirements of the Swiss technical inspection authority.

items.title: Steam boiler — Power Plant (India)
items.description: Manufacture and supply of pressure components for a steam boiler for an Indian investor. The project was executed in compliance with IBR (Indian Boiler Regulations) and client requirements.

projects.title: Investment in the development and implementation of innovative R&D, production and IT infrastructure for the manufacturing of modern energy boilers
projects.program: Regional Operational Programme of Silesian Voivodeship 2007–2013
projects.tagline: Regional Operational Programme of Silesian Voivodeship – a real response to real needs
projects.infoText: Project co-financed by the European Union from the {source} under the {program}.

projects.title: Preparation of the necessary design and technological background for the introduction of a line of gas boilers with an innovative burner system into production
projects.description: The aim of the project is to develop production activities along with their internationalisation through the development of the design and manufacturing technology for gas-fuelled boilers using multi-fuel burners. The project focuses on implementing solutions enabling the burner to be seated in a specialised socket and modern finned flue-gas-to-water and flue-gas-to-air heat exchangers — reducing pollutant emissions and increasing energy efficiency.

footer.description: Manufacturing, modernisation and installation services in professional and industrial power engineering — in Poland and abroad.
